title: Baseline WER and entity accuracy evaluation
description: Run WER and entity accuracy scoring on Deepgram (production) and Whisper Large v3 against gold-92 ground truth. Break down by utterance category and entity type. Report BCa bootstrap CIs.

title: Investigate 2-clip discrepancy between gold_set and ground_truth
description: gold_set.jsonl has 93 entries, ground_truth.jsonl has 91. Identify the 2 missing clips and either add them to ground_truth or document why they were excluded.

title: Entity-aware post-correction with LLM pass
description: Feed Deepgram output + a Rezolve entity list (brands, products, integrations) to an LLM and measure entity accuracy improvement on gold-92. Target <100 ms added latency.
